data.title: 国际服主线Vol.4 第一章前篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] 11/1 (Tue), a new Main Story 'Rabbit of Caerbannog' will be revealed! A new academy
data.body:
[Update Preview]

11/1 (Tue), a new Main Story 'Rabbit of Caerbannog' will be revealed!
A new academy and students will be making their appearance, so please look forward to it, Sensei!

#BlueArchive![BjfF5FQjlcM8VVpZKrFLwE0UU62nTjF8.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/BjfF5FQjlcM8VVpZKrFLwE0UU62nTjF8.jpg)


[11/1(Tue) Temporary Maintenance Notice]
We'll be undergoing temporary maintenance on 11/1 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 11/1 (Tue) 02:00 ~ 08:00 (UTC)
➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101794

*The major content update previously scheduled will take place on 11/8 (Tue).
